attributes.title: HTTP latency guide
attributes.visState:
{"title":"HTTP latency guide","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"## HTTP latency — investigation room

[**Logs**](/app/dashboards#/view/logs-explore) — triage / smoke alarm (top paths Δ + status).
[**Logs / HTTP**](/app/data-explorer/discover/#/?_g=(filters:!(),refreshInterval:(pause:!f,value:30000),time:(from:now-15m,to:now))&_a=(discover:(columns:!(name,serviceName,observedTimestamp,severityText,event_class,event_category,method,path,status,duration_ms,has_trace,body),interval:auto,sort:!(!(observedTimestamp,desc))),metadata:(indexPattern:shared-observability-logs,view:discover))&_q=(filters:!(),query:(language:lucene,query:'log.attributes.event_class%3Aapplication%20AND%20log.attributes.event_category%3Ahttp'))) — Discover access logs.
[**Slow requests (≥500 ms)**](/app/data-explorer/discover/#/?_g=(filters:!(),refreshInterval:(pause:!f,value:30000),time:(from:now-15m,to:now))&_a=(discover:(columns:!(name,serviceName,observedTimestamp,severityText,event_class,event_category,method,path,status,duration_ms,has_trace,body),interval:auto,sort:!(!(observedTimestamp,desc))),metadata:(indexPattern:shared-observability-logs,view:discover))&_q=(filters:!(),query:(language:lucene,query:'%28log.attributes.event_class%3Aapplication%20AND%20log.attributes.event_category%3Ahttp%29%20AND%20log.attributes.duration_ms%3A>=500'))) — Discover filter on duration.

SLO: **p95 ≤ 500 ms** (BFF edge design target).
Use this board for trends and path timelines; use Logs when you only need “is anything hot / breached right now?”.

Managed by shared-gitops-k8s-cluster."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: Overall p50 / p95 over time (SLO 500ms)
attributes.visState: {"title":"Overall p50 / p95 over time (SLO 500ms)","type":"vega","params":{"spec":"{\"$schema\":\"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json\",\"padding\":{\"left\":8,\"right\":8,\"top\":8,\"bottom\":8},\"autosize\":{\"type\":\"fit\",\"contains\":\"padding\"},\"signals\":[{\"name\":\"sloMs\",\"value\":500}],\"data\":[{\"name\":\"timeline\",\"url\":{\"%context%\":true,\"%timefield%\":\"observedTimestamp\",\"index\":\"otel-v1-apm-logs*\",\"body\":{\"size\":0,\"aggs\":{\"timeline\":{\"date_histogram\":{\"field\":\"observedTimestamp\",\"fixed_interval\":\"1m\",\"min_doc_count\":1},\"aggs\":{\"p50\":{\"percentiles\":{\"field\":\"log.attributes.duration_ms\",\"percents\":[50]}},\"p95\":{\"percentiles\":{\"field\":\"log.attributes.duration_ms\",\"percents\":[95]}}}}}}},\"format\":{\"property\":\"aggregations.timeline.buckets\"},\"transform\":[{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"p50\",\"expr\":\"datum.p50.values['50.0']\"},{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"p95\",\"expr\":\"datum.p95.values['95.0']\"}]}],\"scales\":[{\"name\":\"x\",\"type\":\"time\",\"domain\":{\"data\":\"timeline\",\"field\":\"key\"},\"range\":\"width\"},{\"name\":\"y\",\"type\":\"linear\",\"domain\":{\"data\":\"timeline\",\"fields\":[\"p50\",\"p95\"]},\"nice\":true,\"zero\":true,\"range\":\"height\"}],\"axes\":[{\"orient\":\"bottom\",\"scale\":\"x\",\"labelFontSize\":10,\"title\":\"observedTimestamp\",\"titleFontSize\":11},{\"orient\":\"left\",\"scale\":\"y\",\"labelFontSize\":10,\"title\":\"ms\",\"titleFontSize\":11}],\"marks\":[{\"type\":\"rule\",\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"value\":0},\"x2\":{\"signal\":\"width\"},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"signal\":\"sloMs\"},\"stroke\":{\"value\":\"#b00020\"},\"strokeDash\":{\"value\":[4,4]},\"strokeWidth\":{\"value\":1},\"tooltip\":{\"signal\":\"{'SLO p95': sloMs + ' ms'}\"}}}},{\"type\":\"line\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"timeline\"},\"encode\":{\"enter\":{\"interpolate\":{\"value\":\"linear\"},\"stroke\":{\"value\":\"#1a73e8\"},\"strokeWidth\":{\"value\":2}},\"update\":{\"x\":{\"scale\":\"x\",\"field\":\"key\"},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"field\":\"p50\"},\"tooltip\":{\"signal\":\"{title: 'p50', time: utcFormat(datum.key, '%H:%M'), ms: format(datum.p50, '.1f')}\"}}}},{\"type\":\"line\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"timeline\"},\"encode\":{\"enter\":{\"interpolate\":{\"value\":\"linear\"},\"stroke\":{\"value\":\"#c77700\"},\"strokeWidth\":{\"value\":2}},\"update\":{\"x\":{\"scale\":\"x\",\"field\":\"key\"},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"field\":\"p95\"},\"tooltip\":{\"signal\":\"{title: 'p95', time: utcFormat(datum.key, '%H:%M'), ms: format(datum.p95, '.1f')}\"}}}}]}","hideWarnings":true},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: p95 by top paths over time
attributes.visState: {"title":"p95 by top paths over time","type":"vega","params":{"spec":"{\"$schema\":\"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json\",\"padding\":{\"left\":8,\"right\":8,\"top\":8,\"bottom\":8},\"autosize\":{\"type\":\"fit\",\"contains\":\"padding\"},\"data\":[{\"name\":\"raw\",\"url\":{\"%context%\":true,\"%timefield%\":\"observedTimestamp\",\"index\":\"otel-v1-apm-logs*\",\"body\":{\"size\":0,\"aggs\":{\"timeline\":{\"date_histogram\":{\"field\":\"observedTimestamp\",\"fixed_interval\":\"1m\",\"min_doc_count\":1},\"aggs\":{\"paths\":{\"terms\":{\"field\":\"log.attributes.path.keyword\",\"size\":5,\"order\":{\"_count\":\"desc\"}},\"aggs\":{\"p95\":{\"percentiles\":{\"field\":\"log.attributes.duration_ms\",\"percents\":[95]}}}}}}}}},\"format\":{\"property\":\"aggregations.timeline.buckets\"},\"transform\":[{\"type\":\"flatten\",\"fields\":[\"paths.buckets\"],\"as\":[\"bucket\"]},{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"path\",\"expr\":\"datum.bucket.key\"},{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"p95\",\"expr\":\"datum.bucket.p95.values['95.0']\"},{\"type\":\"filter\",\"expr\":\"isValid(datum.p95) && isFinite(datum.p95)\"}]}],\"scales\":[{\"name\":\"x\",\"type\":\"time\",\"domain\":{\"data\":\"raw\",\"field\":\"key\"},\"range\":\"width\"},{\"name\":\"y\",\"type\":\"linear\",\"domain\":{\"data\":\"raw\",\"field\":\"p95\"},\"nice\":true,\"zero\":true,\"range\":\"height\"},{\"name\":\"color\",\"type\":\"ordinal\",\"domain\":{\"data\":\"raw\",\"field\":\"path\"},\"range\":{\"scheme\":\"category10\"}}],\"axes\":[{\"orient\":\"bottom\",\"scale\":\"x\",\"labelFontSize\":10,\"title\":\"observedTimestamp\",\"titleFontSize\":11},{\"orient\":\"left\",\"scale\":\"y\",\"labelFontSize\":10,\"title\":\"p95 ms\",\"titleFontSize\":11}],\"legends\":[{\"fill\":\"color\",\"title\":\"path\",\"orient\":\"right\",\"labelFontSize\":9,\"titleFontSize\":10,\"labelLimit\":160}],\"marks\":[{\"type\":\"group\",\"from\":{\"facet\":{\"name\":\"series\",\"data\":\"raw\",\"groupby\":\"path\"}},\"marks\":[{\"type\":\"line\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"series\"},\"encode\":{\"enter\":{\"interpolate\":{\"value\":\"linear\"},\"strokeWidth\":{\"value\":2}},\"update\":{\"x\":{\"scale\":\"x\",\"field\":\"key\"},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"field\":\"p95\"},\"stroke\":{\"scale\":\"color\",\"field\":\"path\"},\"tooltip\":{\"signal\":\"{title: datum.path, time: utcFormat(datum.key, '%H:%M'), p95: format(datum.p95, '.1f') + ' ms'}\"}}}}]}]}","hideWarnings":true},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: Top paths — RPS + p95 + Δ vs prior 15m (SLO 500ms)
attributes.visState: {"title":"Top paths \u2014 RPS + p95 + \u0394 vs prior 15m (SLO 500ms)","type":"vega","params":{"spec":"{\"$schema\":\"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json\",\"padding\":8,\"autosize\":{\"type\":\"fit\",\"contains\":\"padding\"},\"signals\":[{\"name\":\"windowSeconds\",\"value\":900},{\"name\":\"sloMs\",\"value\":500}],\"data\":[{\"name\":\"baseline\",\"url\":{\"index\":\"otel-v1-apm-logs*\",\"body\":{\"size\":0,\"query\":{\"bool\":{\"filter\":[{\"query_string\":{\"query\":\"log.attributes.event_class:application AND log.attributes.event_category:http\",\"default_operator\":\"AND\"}},{\"range\":{\"observedTimestamp\":{\"gte\":\"now-1800s\",\"lt\":\"now-900s\"}}}]}},\"aggs\":{\"paths\":{\"terms\":{\"field\":\"log.attributes.path.keyword\",\"size\":30,\"order\":{\"_count\":\"desc\"}},\"aggs\":{\"p95\":{\"percentiles\":{\"field\":\"log.attributes.duration_ms\",\"percents\":[95]}}}}}}},\"format\":{\"property\":\"aggregations.paths.buckets\"},\"transform\":[{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"p95Base\",\"expr\":\"datum.p95.values['95.0']\"}]},{\"name\":\"paths\",\"url\":{\"%context%\":true,\"%timefield%\":\"observedTimestamp\",\"index\":\"otel-v1-apm-logs*\",\"body\":{\"size\":0,\"aggs\":{\"paths\":{\"terms\":{\"field\":\"log.attributes.path.keyword\",\"size\":15,\"order\":{\"_count\":\"desc\"}},\"aggs\":{\"p95\":{\"percentiles\":{\"field\":\"log.attributes.duration_ms\",\"percents\":[95]}}}}}}},\"format\":{\"property\":\"aggregations.paths.buckets\"},\"transform\":[{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"p95\",\"expr\":\"datum.p95.values['95.0']\"},{\"type\":\"lookup\",\"from\":\"baseline\",\"key\":\"key\",\"fields\":[\"p95Base\"]},{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"deltaMs\",\"expr\":\"isValid(datum.p95Base) ? datum.p95 - datum.p95Base : null\"},{\"type\":\"formula\",\"as\":\"vsSlo\",\"expr\":\"datum.p95 <= sloMs ? 'ok' : 'breach'\"},{\"type\":\"window\",\"ops\":[\"row_number\"],\"as\":[\"row\"],\"sort\":[{\"field\":\"doc_count\",\"order\":\"descending\"}]}]},{\"name\":\"header\",\"values\":[{\"path\":\"path\",\"count\":\"count\",\"rps\":\"rps/15m\",\"p95\":\"p95 ms\",\"delta\":\"\\u0394 ms\",\"vs\":\"pSLO\",\"row\":0}]}],\"scales\":[{\"name\":\"y\",\"type\":\"band\",\"domain\":{\"data\":\"paths\",\"field\":\"row\"},\"range\":{\"step\":22},\"padding\":0.1}],\"marks\":[{\"type\":\"group\",\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"value\":0},\"y\":{\"value\":0},\"width\":{\"signal\":\"width\"},\"height\":{\"signal\":\"22\"}}},\"marks\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"header\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"value\":0},\"y\":{\"value\":14},\"text\":{\"field\":\"path\"},\"fontWeight\":{\"value\":\"bold\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fill\":{\"value\":\"#333\"}}}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"header\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width * 0.46\"},\"y\":{\"value\":14},\"text\":{\"field\":\"count\"},\"align\":{\"value\":\"right\"},\"fontWeight\":{\"value\":\"bold\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fill\":{\"value\":\"#333\"}}}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"header\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width * 0.56\"},\"y\":{\"value\":14},\"text\":{\"field\":\"rps\"},\"align\":{\"value\":\"right\"},\"fontWeight\":{\"value\":\"bold\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fill\":{\"value\":\"#333\"}}}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"header\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width * 0.68\"},\"y\":{\"value\":14},\"text\":{\"field\":\"p95\"},\"align\":{\"value\":\"right\"},\"fontWeight\":{\"value\":\"bold\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fill\":{\"value\":\"#333\"}}}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"header\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width * 0.82\"},\"y\":{\"value\":14},\"text\":{\"field\":\"delta\"},\"align\":{\"value\":\"right\"},\"fontWeight\":{\"value\":\"bold\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fill\":{\"value\":\"#333\"}}}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"header\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width\"},\"y\":{\"value\":14},\"text\":{\"field\":\"vs\"},\"align\":{\"value\":\"right\"},\"fontWeight\":{\"value\":\"bold\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fill\":{\"value\":\"#333\"}}}}]},{\"type\":\"group\",\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"y\":{\"value\":24},\"width\":{\"signal\":\"width\"},\"height\":{\"signal\":\"height - 24\"}}},\"marks\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"paths\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"value\":0},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"field\":\"row\",\"band\":0.5},\"text\":{\"field\":\"key\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fill\":{\"value\":\"#111\"},\"limit\":{\"signal\":\"width * 0.44\"}}}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"paths\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width * 0.46\"},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"field\":\"row\",\"band\":0.5},\"text\":{\"field\":\"doc_count\"},\"align\":{\"value\":\"right\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fill\":{\"value\":\"#111\"}}}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"paths\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width * 0.56\"},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"field\":\"row\",\"band\":0.5},\"text\":{\"signal\":\"format(datum.doc_count / windowSeconds, '.3f')\"},\"align\":{\"value\":\"right\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fill\":{\"value\":\"#111\"}}}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"paths\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width * 0.68\"},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"field\":\"row\",\"band\":0.5},\"text\":{\"signal\":\"datum.p95 < 1 ? format(datum.p95, '.3f') : format(datum.p95, '.1f')\"},\"align\":{\"value\":\"right\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fill\":{\"signal\":\"datum.vsSlo === 'ok' ? '#0a7a28' : '#b00020'\"}}}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"paths\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width * 0.82\"},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"field\":\"row\",\"band\":0.5},\"text\":{\"signal\":\"!isValid(datum.deltaMs) ? '\\u2014' : (datum.deltaMs > 0 ? '+' : '') + (abs(datum.deltaMs) < 1 ? format(datum.deltaMs, '.2f') : format(datum.deltaMs, '.1f'))\"},\"align\":{\"value\":\"right\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fontWeight\":{\"value\":\"bold\"},\"fill\":{\"signal\":\"datum.vsSlo === 'breach' || (isValid(datum.deltaMs) && datum.deltaMs > 200) ? '#b00020' : (isValid(datum.deltaMs) && (datum.deltaMs > 50 || (isValid(datum.p95Base) && datum.p95Base > 0 && datum.deltaMs / datum.p95Base > 0.5))) ? '#c77700' : '#0a7a28'\"}}}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"from\":{\"data\":\"paths\"},\"encode\":{\"update\":{\"x\":{\"signal\":\"width\"},\"y\":{\"scale\":\"y\",\"field\":\"row\",\"band\":0.5},\"text\":{\"field\":\"vsSlo\"},\"align\":{\"value\":\"right\"},\"fontSize\":{\"value\":11},\"fontWeight\":{\"value\":\"bold\"},\"fill\":{\"signal\":\"datum.vsSlo === 'ok' ? '#0a7a28' : '#b00020'\"}}}}]}]}","hideWarnings":true},"aggs":[]}

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"(log.attributes.event_class:application AND log.attributes.event_category:http) AND log.attributes.duration_ms:>=500","language":"lucene"},"filter":[{"$state":{"store":"appState"},"meta":{"alias":"Hide runtime noise (tagged)","disabled":false,"index":"shared-observability-logs","key":"log.attributes.event_class","negate":true,"type":"phrase","params":{"query":"runtime_noise"}},"query":{"match_phrase":{"log.attributes.event_class":"runtime_noise"}}},{"$state":{"store":"appState"},"meta":{"alias":"Hide untagged epoll lines","disabled":false,"index":"shared-observability-logs","key":"body","negate":true,"type":"custom"},"query":{"wildcard":{"body.keyword":"*epoll select*"}}}],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.title: HTTP latency
attributes.description: HTTP latency investigation: overall p50/p95, path timelines, top-path Δ vs prior window, and slow-request Discover. Companion to Logs triage. Managed by shared-gitops-k8s-cluster
